items.title: Disney Is Broadly Raising Prices for Streaming. It Isn’t Alone.
items.description: Price increases are planned months in advance, but the timing of Disney’s move coincides with viewer frustrations over ABC’s ‘Jimmy Kimmel Live!’

items.title: Apple stock turns positive for 2025 after iPhone 17 launch
items.description: Apple (AAPL) stock's year-to-date performance is inching into the green, but the iPhone maker still lags behind its Big Tech peers. Needham & Company senior media and internet analyst Laura Martin takes a closer look at Apple's position and what's driving investors to the stock as the company struggles to find its footing on artificial intelligence (AI). To watch more expert insights and analysis on the latest market action, check out more Market Domination.

items.title: Top Analyst Reports for Apple, Eli Lilly & Chevron
items.description: Apple grows Services with over 1B subscribers, while Eli Lilly and Chevron face mixed industry and market dynamics.

items.title: Stock Market Today: Nasdaq, S&P 500 End Winning Streaks; Nvidia, Amazon Weigh On Dow (Live Coverage)
items.description: Major indexes closed with losses Tuesday, following Federal Reserve Chairman Jerome Powell's comments including that stocks are "highly valued."  Meanwhile, the Dow Jones Industrial Average was weighed down by Nvidia and Amazon.com on the stock market today.  Blue chips on the Dow started off in the black but ended the day with a 0.2% loss.

items.title: These Stocks Moved the Most Today: Kenvue, Nvidia, Firefly Aerospace, Boeing, Halliburton, Micron, Vistra, and More
items.description: Kenvue shares claw back some losses after falling to a record low Monday. President Donald Trump made an unproven link between acetaminophen, the active ingredient in Kenvue’s painkiller Tylenol, and autism.
